meta.caveat: Diagnostic. Country attributions follow EAR/Wassenaar export-control groupings, not political judgement. Multi-country attributions resolve to 'western' if any party qualifies. Leverage score is a heuristic for prioritising further analysis - not a recommendation to control any specific component.
